summary: All 14/14 pilot tasks completed. Key findings: H1 confirmed (RepSim>TRAK 2/3 tasks), H6 confirmed (16.7pp gap), H9 falsified (condition reversed), H7 failed (whitened degrades -10pp), contrastive scoring zero gain on rank metrics. Pilot stage ready for analysis/transition.
recommendations: revise H9 narrative before full experiments
investigate contrastive scoring with non-rank metrics (LDS/correlation)
whitened attribution needs N>>d, consider dropping H7 or using larger N in full
